transcript.message: Hello, thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. My name is Rohan, and I'm a recruiter here at FinSpark, a growing fintech company. I'd love to learn more about your background and experience. Can you start by telling me a bit about your current role and what you've been working on lately?

I'm Priya Khanna, nice to speak with you, Rohan. Currently, I'm a Mechanical Engineer at Stark Industries, where I've been working on various projects, including designing and developing mechanical systems for their cutting-edge products. My role has given me a solid foundation in problem-solving and collaboration, which I believe would be valuable in a fintech environment.

I'm glad you mentioned your experience in problem-solving and collaboration, Priya, those are definitely valuable skills in our industry. However, I'm looking for a Senior AI Engineer to join our team, so I'd love to understand how your background in mechanical engineering has led you to be interested in AI and fintech. Can you tell me a bit about what sparked your interest in AI and how you think your skills might translate to this role?

I've always been fascinated by the intersection of technology and human behavior, and I've been exploring AI and machine learning in my free time. I've been experimenting with natural language processing and deep learning, and I've found it really interesting to see how these technologies can be applied to real-world problems. I think my problem-solving skills and attention to detail from my mechanical engineering background could be a good fit for a role like this, where I'd be working with complex AI systems and data.

I'm impressed by your self-directed learning, Priya, it's great to see you're enthusiastic about AI and its applications. Now, I'd love to know more about your interest in this specific opportunity at FinSpark. What is it about our company and this role that excites you, and do you think you'd be a good fit for our team?

I appreciate your enthusiasm about my self-directed learning, Rohan. To be honest, I'm drawn to FinSpark's innovative approach to fintech and the company's commitment to using technology to drive positive change. I'm also impressed by the company's focus on AI and machine learning, and I think my skills and experience could be a good fit for the team. I'd love to learn more about the specific projects and initiatives that the Senior AI Engineer would be working on.

I'm glad you're interested in learning more about our projects, Priya. As a Senior AI Engineer at FinSpark, you would be working on building and maintaining our hybrid search infrastructure, which involves designing and implementing embeddings-based retrieval systems. Can you tell me a bit about your experience with vector databases and retrieval systems, and how you think you could contribute to this area?

I do have some experience with vector databases and retrieval systems, although it's not directly related to my current role at Stark Industries. I've been experimenting with Pinecone and Hugging Face Transformers in my personal projects, and I've found it fascinating to see how these technologies can be applied to semantic search and recommendation systems. I think my experience with these tools could be a good starting point for contributing to FinSpark's hybrid search infrastructure.

I'm glad you have some experience with vector databases and retrieval systems, Priya. As a Senior AI Engineer at FinSpark, you would also be working closely with our evaluation frameworks for ranking systems, which involves metrics like NDCG, MRR, and MAP. Can you tell me a bit about your experience with these evaluation metrics and how you would approach optimizing a ranking system for our use case?

I've had some exposure to these evaluation metrics through my personal projects and online courses, although I wouldn't say I'm an expert. I've worked with metrics like precision, recall, and F1 score, and I've also experimented with using tools like Hugging Face Transformers to fine-tune models for specific ranking tasks. I think my experience with these metrics and tools could be a good starting point for optimizing a ranking system for FinSpark's use case.

Priya, it was an absolute pleasure speaking with you today. I'm really impressed by your enthusiasm for AI and fintech, as well as your willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies. I think you'd be a great fit for our team, and I'm excited to discuss this opportunity further with you. I'll be in touch within the next few days to let you know the next steps, and I wish you all the best in your job search. Thank you again for your time today, and I look forward to speaking with you soon.

Thank you, Rohan, it was a pleasure speaking with you as well. I appreciate the time you took to discuss the opportunity with me and share more about FinSpark's work. I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon and learning more about the next steps. Have a great day and I wish you all the best with your recruitment efforts.
